zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire於1502年9月23日出生在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞時，他的父親Sir Thomas Fenton26歲，母親Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh24歲。他於1530年與Lady Cecily Beaumont在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1562年8月3日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特萊希斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Northumberland, Staffordshire, and Nottinghamshire, so called from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

Irish: English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Fionnachta or Ó Fiachna ‘descendant of Fiachna’, an old personal name Anglicized as Feighney and sometimes mistranslated as Hunt (see Fee 1 and Finnerty ).
Scottish: habitational name from Fenton in East Lothian.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

variants.name: Fantom
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English fantom, fainton ‘apparition, ghost’. There has been some confusion with Fenton .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire was born on 23 September 1502, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Fenton, was 26 and his mother, Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh, was 24. He married Lady Cecily Beaumont in 1530, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 August 1562, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Leicester Cathedral, Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire est né le 23 septembre 1502, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Fenton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecily Beaumont en 1530, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 août 1562, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester Cathedral, Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

September 1502 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Fenton 26 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh 24. Er hat 1530 in Cork, County Cork, Irland Lady Cecily Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. August 1562 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicester Cathedral, Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Cecily Beaumont nel 1530, nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ko.Leicester Cathedral, Leicester, Leiceste: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 레이스스터 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire(이)가 1502년 9월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fenton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1530년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 Lady Cecily Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1562년 8월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 레이스스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1502, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fenton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecily Beaumont em 1530, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Fenton of Nottinghamshire родился 23 сентября 1502 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fenton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Catherine De Burgh, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecily Beaumont в 1530 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 августа 1562 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир кэтедраль, лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
